name: Hunan TV & Broadcast Intermediary Co., Ltd.
summary: Hunan TV & Broadcast Intermediary Co., Ltd. engages in the advertising business in the People's Republic of China. It offers advertising agencies, Internet media, rail self-media advertising, online games, etc.; and engages in the investment business. The company also operates the cable TV network business; and amusement park and a five-star Saint Fitz Hotel. Hunan TV & Broadcast Intermediary Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is based in Changsha, the People's Republic of China.
